failedAssertions.reason: CLI `spikes pull` / `spikes pull --from` did not complete the required widget-to-CLI retrieval path in local validation; flow report captured API-level spike retrieval but CLI round-trip remained broken.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Local worker billing endpoints returned billing-not-configured errors because Stripe runtime configuration is unavailable in this local validation environment.
`spikes billing` depends on `/billing/portal` returning a live Stripe Customer Portal URL, which was unavailable due to local Stripe configuration dependency.
`spikes upgrade` depends on `/billing/checkout` returning a live Stripe Checkout URL, which was unavailable due to local Stripe configuration dependency.
Free-tier limit/CTA behavior was validated, but end-to-end checkout upgrade completion could not be exercised without local Stripe checkout configuration.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for monetization API/CLI and cross-area monetization flow isolation.
Added monetization-specific testing quirks for `spikes pull --from` host resolution and share HTML widget endpoint behavior.
